calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $336.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
